payload.last_assistant_message:
A short next-step follow-up question usually works well after an explanatory response.

In many cases, options like do it now, show an example, or stop here are already enough.

judge_result.rationale: The assistant surfaced several follow-up options and the user has not chosen among them yet.

context_contains: A short next-step follow-up question usually works well after an explanatory response.
reason_contains: Generate the header, exactly one follow-up question

immediately continue in the same turn
